name: Mangoes in Wine (Tahiti)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin from the mangoes and slice them in half, removing the seeds.
2. Arrange the slices with the hollow side upwards in a large bowl.
3. Cover with wine.
4. Add sugar and vanilla pods.
5. Bake for 45 minutes.
6. Allow to cool and chill well before serving.
